title: The Father's Worshippers
content:
'Tis we, not in thine arms, who weep and pray;
    The children in thy bosom laugh and play.
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Father's Worshippers"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
